strengths: Experienced in multiple programming languages and technologies relevant to the fintech and AI stack
Proven track record of building and maintaining complex software systems
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing methodologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI architecture and production AI systems
No clear evidence of experience in fintech infrastructure or regulated environments
Not explicitly demonstrated experience in scaling engineering teams to 30+ people
response.justification: The candidate has a broad technical background and experience in building complex systems, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI and fintech infrastructure, which are key requirements for the role.
